answer:
We are given \( f(f(n)) + f(n) = 2n + 3 \) and \( f(0) = 1 \).  
First, set \( n = 0 \): \( f(f(0)) + f(0) = 3 \), so \( f(1) + 1 = 3 \), giving \( f(1) = 2 \).  
Then set \( n = 1 \): \( f(f(1)) + f(1) = 5 \), so \( f(2) + 2 = 5 \), giving \( f(2) = 3 \).  
This pattern suggests \( f(n) = n + 1 \), which satisfies the equation. Thus \( f(2012) = 2013 \).

\boxed{C}
